descriptionTemplate: Horla gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Immediately gain 1 stack of {Metaphor} other than the current {Emotion}; also gain 1 stack At turn start. Each {Metaphor} stacks up to 3 times. Each stack of {Metaphor} is consumed when a Psalm {Leap} s, granting a corresponding bonus.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Horla gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Immediately gain 1 stack of {Metaphor} for each {Emotion} other than the current {Emotion}. At each turn start, also gain 1 stack for each other 3 emotions, up to 3 stacks per type. When a Psalm trigger {Leap}, consumes all stacks of its corresponding {Metaphor} and receives bonus. After releasing {Annihilation}, Horla's next Command Card played this turn triggers {Leap}. Whenever Horla consumes 3 or more stacks of {Metaphor}, the current {Emotion}'s effect +[Arg2]% temporarily. This effect cannot stack.
